diagnostic_question: What in the learning environment blocks autonomy and engagement?
reasoning_chain: Observe how students experience the classroom environment
Identify barriers to autonomy, hands-on activity, and success
Redesign environment, materials, and teacher guidance
Enable self-directed progress in small achievable steps
must_do: Focus on prepared environment and learner autonomy
Propose concrete classroom and school-day changes
Link recommendations explicitly to Montessori's theory
must_not_do: Default to lecture-only or punitive discipline
Propose generic motivation slogans without environment design

output_schema.primary_stakeholder: Teachers and students in the classroom

sequential_stage.task: VAIHE 3 — Redesign the school-day environment using insights from prior stages.
